_comment: Unit type library. Values are simplified but grounded in open-source data. sensor_km = detection range, weapon_km = max engagement range, attack_per_tick = damage per 60s tick at full engagement, default_hp = starting health (represents unit/platform survivability, not raw vehicle HP).

f16c.notes: AN/APG-68(V)9 radar ~150km vs fighter. AIM-120C AMRAAM BVR up to 105km; AGM-65 Maverick for CAS. Block 50 carries HTS pod for SEAD.

f35a.notes: AN/APG-81 AESA radar, AN/AAQ-37 DAS 360° EO. AIM-120D ~180km, JSM anti-ship. Low observable reduces effective sensor range of adversary.

eurofighter.notes: Captor-E AESA radar ~160km. Meteor BVRAAM range-denied ~100km. Highly maneuverable for WVR.

su27s.notes: N001 Myech coherent pulse-Doppler radar, ~100km vs fighter. R-77 active-homing AAM ~80km. Strong at WVR with high alpha capability.

su30sm.notes: N011M Bars PESA radar ~120km. Kh-59MK2 for DEAD/SEAD, Kh-35U anti-ship. Thrust-vectoring canards for extreme maneuverability.

su34.notes: Primary strike platform. Sh-141 terrain-following radar, Kh-31P for SEAD. Carries Kh-29T/L PGMs. Built-in rear-warning radar.

challenger2.notes: L30A1 120mm rifled gun, CHARM-3 APFSDS effective ~3km. TOGS-2 thermal imager gives night capability. Represents 56-tank battalion (14 tanks/coy × 4 coys).

t80u.notes: 2A46M-1 125mm smoothbore, 9M119 Svir ATGM through barrel ~5km. Shtora-1 active protection limits ATGM effectiveness. Kontakt-5 ERA. Agava-2 thermal ~3km.

leopard2a6.notes: Rh-120/L55 gun fires DM53 APFSDS, ~4km effective. PERI R17A2 commander sight with independent thermal. Add-on CLARA mine protection.

infantry_mech.notes: ~600 troops in IFVs (Bradley/CV90/BMP). Milan/Javelin ATGMs ~3-4km. Organic 120mm mortars. IFV 25-30mm cannon for dismounts.

infantry_light.notes: ~700 troops foot-mobile. Small arms 300m effective. NLAW/AT-4 ~600m. Javelin ~2.5km where available. Limited vs armour without fire support.

vdv_btg.notes: ~700 troops in BMD-4M/BTR-MDM. Kornet ATGM ~5km, 2S9 Nona 120mm mortar SP. Air-droppable. 9K338 Igla-S MANPADS for self-defence vs air.

himars.notes: M30A1 GMLRS ~70km GPS/INS guided, CEP <5m. ATACMS block IA ~165km (not modelled separately). 6-round pod, ~50min reload. Can fire on coordinates from external targeting — does not need own sensor contact.

mlrs_m270.notes: Dual-pod: 12× M30/31 GMLRS or 2× ATACMS. Higher volume than HIMARS.

iskander_m.notes: 9M723-1 quasi-ballistic missile ~500km (treaty-declared 480km). CEP 5-7m with DSMAC terminal. Maneuvering re-entry limits ABM intercept. 9M729 cruise missile variant. Brigade = 12 TELs.

patriot_pac3.notes: AN/MPQ-65 radar, 180° coverage. PAC-3 MSE hit-to-kill vs TBM, cruise, aircraft. 16 PAC-3 per fire unit. Engages aircraft at ~70km, TBM ~40km. Stationary when emplaced.

s300v4.notes: 9M82MV missile 200km vs aircraft/cruise/TBM. 9S32M radar. Engages multiple targets simultaneously. 6 launchers, 4 missiles each. Stationary when emplaced.

buk_m3.notes: 9M317M missile ~70km vs aircraft, cruise, some TBM. 9S36 passive phased array. Mobile — can fire while moving at low speed. 6 missiles per TEL.

pantsir_s1.notes: Short-range SHORAD. 57E6 missiles to 20km/15km altitude + twin 30mm autocannon to 4km. Protects SAM batteries from HARM and drones.

nasams.notes: Fires AIM-120C/D AMRAAM and AIM-9X. AN/MPQ-64F1 Sentinel radar. Networked — can receive remote fire control data. 12 missiles per fire unit.

frigate_hnlms.notes: SMART-L 3D radar D-band 400km vs TBM, 100km vs fighter. Mk41 VLS: SM-2 MR ~90km AAW, ESSM quad-packed. Harpoon Block II anti-ship 280km. 76mm OTO Melara for surface/shore. NH90 helicopter.

destroyer_arleigh.notes: AN/SPY-1D(V) Aegis, ~550km horizon. SM-2 Block IIIB ~167km, SM-6 dual-role ~240km. Tomahawk LACM 1600km (not modelled). Harpoon ASuW ~280km. 5in NGF for shore.

slava_cg.notes: 16× P-1000 Vulkan ASM ~700km (saturation attack potential). S-300F Rif-M 48× missiles, range ~90km vs aircraft. MR-800 Top Pair 3D radar. Gun battery 2× AK-130. Heavy cruiser; primary anti-ship role.

submarine_ula.notes: Type 212 hull, AIP propulsion. DM2A4 heavyweight torpedo ~50km. Very quiet. Passive sonar dominant. Difficult to detect — effective sensor range vs SSK is ~30km for most surface combatants.

a10c.notes: GAU-8 Avenger 30mm rotary ~1.2km effective. AGM-65H Maverick EO/IIR ~22km. Mk82/GBU-12. High survivability vs small arms/cannon. Vulnerable to IR SAMs and radar AAMs — needs SEAD support.

su25.notes: Kh-25ML laser ~10km, S-13 rockets. Heavily armoured cockpit/engine. SPO-15LE RWR. Extremely vulnerable to MANPADS and medium SAMs — operates below cloud cover.
